match.title: Eliminator
match.ground: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, New Chandigarh

scoring_rules.note: Uncapped players get 2x multiplier ONLY if: 30+ runs OR 3+ wickets OR 3+ fielding dismissals
conditions: 3+ fielding dismissals (catches + runouts + direct hits + stumpings)
